title: Litmus Email Test
description: Schema for Litmus email test objects representing preview rendering, spam filter, and link-check test requests and results across email clients and filter services.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the email test

status.description: Overall processing status of the email test

subject.description: Email subject line submitted for testing

from_address.description: Sender email address used in spam filter evaluation

from_name.description: Sender display name used in spam filter context

created_at.description: Timestamp when the test was created

completed_at.description: Timestamp when all requested test types completed

previews_requested.description: Whether email client preview rendering was included in this test

spam_requested.description: Whether spam filter testing was included in this test

links_requested.description: Whether link reachability checking was included in this test

previews.description: Rendering results for each requested email client

spam_results.description: Results from each spam filter service checked

link_results.description: Reachability results for each URL found in the email HTML

PreviewResult.description: Email rendering result for a single email client

client_name.description: Human-readable display name of the email client

platform.description: Platform category of the email client

status.description: Rendering completion status for this client

full_image_url.description: URL of the full-size rendered screenshot image

thumb_image_url.description: URL of the thumbnail rendered screenshot image

orientation.description: Display orientation of the rendered screenshot

SpamResult.description: Result from a single spam filter service

filter.description: Name of the spam filter service

is_spam.description: Whether the email was flagged as spam by this filter

score.description: Spam score returned by the filter (scale varies by provider)

threshold.description: Spam score threshold above which the filter flags messages as spam

status.description: Processing status of the spam filter check

LinkResult.description: Reachability check result for a single URL found in the email HTML

url.description: The URL that was checked for reachability

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned when the URL was fetched

reachable.description: Whether the URL was successfully reachable at time of test

redirect_url.description: Final destination URL after HTTP redirects, if applicable

EmailClient.description: An email client available for preview rendering

id.description: Unique identifier or slug for the email client

name.description: Human-readable display name of the email client

platform.description: Platform category of the email client

available.description: Whether this client is currently available for rendering
